description: The TouchEventRelay component is used to relay touch events recieved by a slot to other ITouchables.

fields.Touched: The sync delegate to call when this receives a touch event.
fields.AcceptOutOfSightTouch: Whether this component allows touch events from a user not looking directly at the slot with this component.
fields.TouchableTargets: Target touchable components to send the touch event to.

usage: *To trigger a hyperlink component without a touchable/interactable component you can use a TouchEventRelay. You a touch event relay on the collider of your object, then put a hyperlink or other touchables as children (with no colliders on them) then add them to the TouchableTargets list of the TouchEventRelay.

notes.title: Related Components
notes.text:
* Touchable Events can be used with TouchEventRelay.
TouchEventRelay can relay events from a Touchable element to fire another ITouchable component.
